variants: Ines Flandin resides in Meadowveil Shire, but her journey began in Glintwater Banks, where she first developed her passion for innovative design. Currently, she is employed at Shimmerstep Lighting, contributing her expertise to numerous projects. Her outstanding efforts in the lighting industry were recognized when she received the Candledusk Citation. Additionally, Ines authored the book Thornwood Fusion Solution, which provides valuable insights into her creative process and industry knowledge.

Born in Glintwater Banks, Ines Flandin has established her current residence in Meadowveil Shire. She is a dedicated employee at Shimmerstep Lighting, where her creativity and expertise shine through her work. In recognition of her efforts, Ines received the esteemed Candledusk Citation, underscoring her impact on the lighting field. Besides her contributions at Shimmerstep, she has also authored Thornwood Fusion Solution, a significant work that showcases her innovative approaches to lighting solutions.
